policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="tokenBody" value="@{
            string body;
            try
            {
                body = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
            }
            catch
            {
                body = string.Empty;
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(body))
            {
                return string.Empty;
            }

            var kept = new System.Collections.Generic.List();
            foreach (var pair in body.Split('&'))
            {
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(pair))
                {
                    continue;
                }
                var eq = pair.IndexOf('=');
                var key = eq >= 0 ? pair.Substring(0, eq) : pair;
                if (string.Equals(key, "resource", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    continue;
                }
                kept.Add(pair);
            }
            return string.Join("&", kept);
        }" />
        
            https://login.microsoftonline.com/{{McpTenantId}}/oauth2/v2.0/token
            POST
            
                application/x-www-form-urlencoded
            
            @((string)context.Variables["tokenBody"])
